entry.title: New: DRIP-3 Bill 104 (2024) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BILL 104 (2024), AMENDING CHAPTERS 19.04, 19.08, AND 19.29, MAUI COUNTY CODE, RELATING TO KITCHENS, KITCHENETTES, AND WET BARS; AND SECTION 19.36B.020, MAUI COUNTY CODE, TO ADD PARKING REQUIREMENTS FOR DWELLING UNITS WITH KITCHENETTES (DRIP-3)

Disaster Recovery, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
